title: Platform-spec home browse/map UX polish

source.subject: fix(docs-ui): platform-spec home UX — tabs, map height, zoom, typography

body:
## Outcome

Platform-spec home UX — tabs, map height, zoom, typography.

## Context

- Workstream **docs-site** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Platform-spec cutover** (`v02-platform-spec-cutover`).
- Normative updates live under `site/website/src/content/docs/platform-spec/` and ship via beskid-lang.org.
